notableMoments: One of only 13 teams to participate in the inaugural 1930 World Cup in Uruguay
44-year gap between their second (1950) and third (1994) World Cup appearances
Erwin Sánchez scored Bolivia's first World Cup goal in 64 years against Spain in 1994
Held Spain to a 3-1 deficit in 1994 after scoring a memorable consolation goal
Won the 1963 Copa América as hosts, the greatest achievement in Bolivian football
Known for their formidable home advantage at the Hernando Siles stadium in La Paz at 3,637m altitude
